name: pr_cep_c_upd_evict_revive
_finding: CLASS 2 (item C): external UPDATE of a window-EVICTED event re-adds it to the windowed accumulate. advance 60 evicts E0@ts0 from window:time(50) (count 1->0); the update re-propagates the still-is_alive event -> engine re-adds (count 0->1); Drools keeps it evicted. engine: W[1] W[1] ; oracle: W[1] W[0]. Same root as c_upd_after_exp (expiration variant): a clock-driven STAGED removal is undone by a later update. Controls: evict-only PASSES (w4); update-BEFORE-evict PASSES (w2); delete-after-evict PASSES (w3).
drl: rule W when accumulate( E0() over window:time(50ms); $c : count() ) then end
